# Jumpspace Agent Routing Index

Jumpspace gives coding agents source-backed intent memory inside a repo.

## Start Here

- /start-here/welcome/ explains the first useful win.
- /start-here/quickstart/ gives new repo, existing repo, and agent setup paths.
- /core-concepts/intents/ explains durable decisions, rationale, and rejected alternatives.
- /core-concepts/scopes-and-lookup/ explains path-scoped intent matching.
- /start-here/existing-repo-bootstrap/ explains advanced task graph bootstrap propose, validate, dry-run, and apply.
- /start-here/agent-setup/ explains `add-skill --all`, `--codex`, `--claude`, and named pipeline skill installs.
- /start-here/why-jumpspace/ compares Jumpspace to Git, issue trackers, docs, vector search, and generic memory.
- /start-here/faq/ covers merge conflicts, teammate adoption, ask trust, and what to commit.

## Workflows

- /workflows/add-jumpspace-to-a-repo/
- /workflows/bootstrap-existing-docs/
- /workflows/canonical-demo/
- /workflows/ask-questions-with-evidence/
- /workflows/start-agent-work/
- /workflows/verify-work/
- /workflows/review-pr-drift/
- /workflows/handoff-between-agents/

## Agent Skills

- /agent-skills/overview/
- /agent-skills/codex/
- /agent-skills/claude-code/
- /agent-skills/manual-install/

Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and OpenCode do not have native installers yet; use the
manual guidance pages.

## Reference

- /reference/cli/
- /reference/json-schemas/
- /reference/config/
- /reference/status-lifecycle/
- /reference/error-envelopes/
- /reference/ci/
- /reference/sdks/

## Jumpspace Cloud

- /jumpspace-cloud/ invites early design partners for a cloud version of Jumpspace.

## Future Ideas

- /contribute/future-improvements/ lists demo, onboard, broader agent installer,
  MCP, and benchmark ideas that are not current commands.

## Agent Behavior

Before editing code, check scoped intent:

```bash
npx @jumpspace/cli intent check --for <path> --json
```

For repos that intentionally use advanced task blocks, prefer:

```bash
npx @jumpspace/cli task work <TASK_ID> --json
```

When pausing or switching agents, run:

```bash
npx @jumpspace/cli task handoff --task <TASK_ID> --json
```
